segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Customer support, how may I help you? Well, my computer keeps overheating and shutting down. Have you checked if the fans are working properly? Dust can accumulate and block airflow. I haven't looked at that. You can get a can of compressed air and spray it into the vents and the fans to blow out the dust. Okay, I'll try that. Hopefully. That take care of the problem. If not, you'll probably need to ship it to us . so we can take a look.
